titleStmt.title: SII 41.363: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 363. (A.R. No. 578 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple in Vijayamaṅgalam.

summary.p: Refers to the renovation works of the maṇḍapa and registers the reengraving of the contents of old inscriptions found on the walls of old structure. This new inscription refers to old gifts made for lamps by different persons during the reigns of Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa and Vīrarājēndradēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vikramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu cakaraiyāṇṭu Āyirattorunū
ṟṟeṇpattañcu kuṟuppunāṭṭu vicaiyamaṅkalattu Āḷuṭaiyār tirunākiśvaramuṭai
yār koyil mutaṟ pirakāramaṇṭapa miṟakkit tiruppaṇi ceyyak koṇṭa
paṭiyāl maṇṭapamuñ ceytu muṉṉāḷ vaitta cantiyātipaṅkaḷ paḻaṅ kalveṭṭi
ṉpaṭiyeṭuttu Immaṇṭapattil veṭṭiṉapaṭiyāvatu śrīkulottuṅkacoḻate
vaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉālāvatu vicaiyamaṅkalattu veḷḷāḷaṉ paṭaittalaikaḷil
mātevaṉ Āḷuṭaiyār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiyāṟku vaitta cantiyātipa moṉṟuk koṭukki
ṉa putuccalākai Accoṉṟu śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉālāvatu vicai
yamaṅkalattuk kaikkoḷaṉ makiḻaṉtevaṉ Āḷuṭaiyār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiyāṟku
vaitta cantiyātipa moṉṟukkoṭukkiṉa putuccalākai Accoṉṟum śrīvirarāje
ndradevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu vicaiyamaṅkalattu veḷḷāḷaṉ paṭattalaikaḷil māṇi
kkatevaṉ maṉiccāl Uṭaiyāṉ pe kā piḷḷai Āḷuṭaiyār tirunākiśvara- muṭaiyāṟku vaitta
cantiyātipamoṉṟuk koṭukkiṉa putuccalākai yacco rājentradevaṟku yāṇṭu
Iraṇṭāvatuk ketirāvatu vicaiyamaṅkalattup paṭṭāli veṭṭuvaṉ cokkañāṉacampantaṉ
Āḷuṭaiyār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiyāṟku vaitta cantiyātipamoṉṟukkoṭukkiṉa paḻañcalā
kai Accoṉṟum śrīvirarājentradevaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu vicaiyamaṅkalattu veḷḷā
ḷaṉ paṭattalaikaḷi tiruvāṉaikkāvaṉ viccā
ṉaikkiḻatti Āḷuṭaiyār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiyāṟku
vaitta cantiyātipa moṉṟuk koṭukkiṉa paḻañca
lākai Accoṉṟum śrīvirarājentradevaṟkuyā
ṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu vicaiyamaṅkalattu Oṉṟaṉ
tevaṉ māraṉ ciṟu Āḷuṭaiyār tirunākiśva
ramuṭaiyāṟku vaitta cantiyā tipamoṉṟuk koṭukkina
paḻañcalākai Accoṉṟum śrīvirarājentradevaṟkuyā
ṇṭu patiṉeḻāvatu vicaiyamaṅkalattu veḷḷāḷaṉ paṭa
ttalaikaḷil niyāyavallava coḻa viḻupparaiyaṉāyaṉ Etirili co
ḻaṉ vaitta cantiyā tipamoṉṟuk koṭukkiṉa paḻañcalāContinuation not traceable.
Digital edition of SII 41.363 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
